name: planner
description: Personal style-guide plugin for Bruno Chiaramonti's executive planning artifacts (daily + weekly). Provides a dark-mode, typography-first design system (Georgia + Inter, terracota + azul petroleo palette, zero ornament) applied automatically whenever personal planners, daily dashboards, weekly previews, sunday planning or cron-generated HTML are produced. From v2.0.0, the daily planner emits a canonical `.md` (YAML frontmatter + Markdown body) as source of truth at `~/Documents/brain/0-inbox/plan-review/daily/YYYY/MM/daily-YYYY-MM-DD.md` and publishes the derived HTML to the `daily-planner-live` Cowork live artifact via `mcp__cowork__update_artifact`; manual edits to the .md plus `/planner sync` propagate changes without re-extracting data. Daily planner uses header 5-zone + body 3-col + footer 2-col (focus on execution). Weekly planner uses 4 bands fit-screen with Orquestra dos 5 dias as hero and Preflight ancorado ao fundo (focus on orchestration); weekly keeps v1.x direct-HTML output until v2.1+. Integrates TrainingPeaks MCP (body metrics), Google Calendar MCP, ClickUp MCP, and Cowork MCP. Scope is strictly personal artifacts — M7 corporate outputs use different design systems.
